Pf.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"Corrected the following issues: 1. Added missing AUTHOR tag for 'Frischens Harpfen Davids'. 2. Corrected 'B\u0000\u0000cher' to 'Bücher'. 3. Corrected '4t\u0000\u0000.' to '4to.' and '8v\u0000\u0000.' to '8vo.' for consistency. 4. Corrected 'PRICE' to 'PRIZE' in one instance. 5. Corrected 'xf.' for 'xr.' where appropriate. 6. Added missing AUTHOR tags where implied. 7. Corrected 'fl.' to 'Pfund' where appropriate. 8. Corrected 'Tom.' to 'Tom.' for consistency. 9. Corrected 'albho.' to 'albo.' 10. Corrected 'Eydgno\u0000\u0000schafft' to 'Eydgnoüschafft'. 11. Corrected 'Homen Hias & Odyfl.' to 'Homer Hias & Odysseus'. 12. Corrected '4. Pf.' to '4. Pfund.' for consistency."}
